description.unified: Attacks a random enemy 5 times to deal Magic DMG and stunning the target for [0.6 sec->1 sec] each hit. Deals additional Magic DMG per Ember stack to Non-Hero enemies. Upon a Crit Hit, recovers own Mana by 100.

Attacks the target and the enemies in nearby range, dealing Magic DMG and stunning them for [1.2 sec.->2 sec.] Deals additional Magic DMG per Ember stack to Non-Hero enemies. Inflicts [(added) 12] Ember stacks on hit targets.
Attacks all enemies 5 times, dealing Magic DMG. This attack deals 150% increased Crit DMG. Deals additional Magic DMG per Ember stack to Non-Hero enemies.

Inflicts a stack of Ember upon hitting an enemy. Enemies affected by Ember take Magic DMG over 20 sec. Ember can be stacked up to max 12 times and upon hitting an enemy with max number of stacks, recovers Mana by 30.

dark.unified: Changes target to the enemy with the highest ATK. [(removed) Mana cost increases by 1000, but damage increases by 100%]
Reduces Mana Cost by [2000->2] for 10 sec when attacking more than 5 enemies. 10 sec Cooldown is applied.
Every 10 sec, enemies affected by Ember are stunned for [1.2 sec.->2 sec.] Enemies with more than 10 stacks of Ember are stunned for [1.8 sec.->3 sec.]

description.unified: [Fire Ball] Reduces Mana Cost by 1 and increases DMG by {0}%.
Increases ATK Spd by {0}. Skill hits deal additional Magic DMG per stack of Ember inflicted on enemies.
